message:
fix(wasm): throw RangeError on memory.grow failure and return previous page count

The WebAssembly.Memory.grow() polyfill previously returned the raw result of
__pi_wasm_memory_grow_native without checking for failure. Per the WebAssembly
spec, grow() must return the previous number of pages on success and throw a
RangeError when growth fails (e.g., exceeding the declared maximum).

Changes:
- Check if the native grow result is negative (failure indicator)
- Throw a RangeError with descriptive message on failure
- Return previous page count on success (unchanged behavior)
- Add test: js_polyfill_memory_grow_returns_previous_pages verifies that
  growing a (1,10) memory by 2 pages returns 1 (the previous page count)
  and the buffer size reflects 3 pages (3 * 65536 bytes)
- Add test: js_polyfill_memory_grow_failure_throws_range_error verifies
  that growing a (1,1) memory by 1 page (would exceed max) throws RangeError

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
